description: Diego's safety + lifecycle hooks: bash validation, post-edit style check, session snapshots, and git worktree create/remove.

hooks.command: payload=$(cat); b=$(echo "$payload" | jq -r '.branch_name // .branch // .ref // empty'); w=$(echo "$payload" | jq -r '.worktree_path // .path // empty'); if [ -z "$b" ] || [ -z "$w" ]; then echo 'missing branch or path in WorktreeCreate payload' >&2; exit 1; fi; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "WorktreeCreate: cwd $(pwd) is not a git repo" >&2; exit 1; fi; cd "$root" && git worktree add -b "$b" "$w"

payload=$(cat); w=$(echo "$payload" | jq -r '.worktree_path // .path // empty'); [ -z "$w" ] && exit 1; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$root" ] && exit 1; cd "$root" && (git worktree remove --force "$w" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$w")
